title: Mobvote 2023 - Crab
description: This mod contains the 2023 mobvote crab mob
body:
This mod contains the crab mob from the 2023 mobvote.

### About the crab:

-25% chance to drop crab claw when attacked

-crabs will regenerate their claw after 5-10 minutes

-crab claw can be used in hand to place / hit blocks further away (+4 block range) and will decrease its durability

-crab claw can be cooked

-they can climb blocks

-they can be found in the mangrove swamp biome

-can be tempted and breed with sea grass



Thanks for downloading this mod!
